title: Printul din Bubuieci
overview: Kofi Kompaore, an African prince and university professor living in Moldova, is suddenly accused of human trafficking after a coup d'état takes place in his home country. Placed under house arrest in his in-laws' home in Bubuieci, Kofi confronts cultural tensions, prejudice, and corruption. Between unexpected humorous situations and moments of introspection, he fights to prove his innocence and discover the true meaning of love.
